name: Scalloped Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and crumbs.
2. Cover the bottom of a buttered shallow casserole with one-third of the crumb and butter mixture.
3. Mix together the cream, Worcestershire sauce, sherry, oyster liquor, salt, pepper, and cayenne to make sauce.
4. Arrange half of the oysters on the crumbs in the casserole.
5. Alternate layers of crumbs, oysters, and sauce, ending with crumbs on top.
6. Bake at 425°F for 30 minutes.
Serves 8 to 10
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
